message:
feat: show context window token usage in status bar

Parse input_tokens from ASSISTANT_TEXT_END SSE event and display in
the status bar as 'ctx: 42k' after each turn. Formatted compactly:
<1k shows exact count, <10k shows one decimal (e.g. 1.2k), >=10k
shows integer k (e.g. 42k). Updates on every completed turn.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
